description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From your primary checking account, schedule a one-time $85 payment to your electricity utility for next Friday.
tasks.name: From your primary checking account, schedule a one-time $85 payment to your electricity utility for next Friday.

tasks.instruction: Set up an automatic transfer of $250 from your primary checking account into a savings sub‑account on the 1st of each month for the next 6 months, starting next month.
tasks.name: Set up an automatic transfer of $250 from your primary checking account into a savings sub‑account on the 1st of each month for the next 6 months, starting next month.
tasks.description: Set up an automatic transfer of $250 from your primary checking account into a savings sub‑account on the 1st of each month for the next 6 months, starting next month.

tasks.instruction: In your personal rewards credit card account, filter the last 60 days of grocery transactions over $200, sort by amount, and add a note saying “Business expense” to the single largest one.
tasks.name: In your personal rewards credit card account, filter the last 60 days of grocery transactions over $200, sort by amount, and add a note saying “Business expense” to the single largest one.

tasks.instruction: Create a new savings sub‑account named “Vacation 2025” with a $0 initial deposit, then schedule a weekly $75 transfer from your primary checking account into this new sub‑account every Monday starting next week.

tasks.instruction: In the rewards section, redeem 5,000 points as a statement credit to whichever eligible credit card currently has the highest APR.

tasks.instruction: Order a replacement debit card for your primary checking account, choosing the active card design with the lowest available replacement fee and using standard free shipping.
tasks.name: Order a replacement debit card for your primary checking account, choosing the active card design with the lowest available replacement fee and using standard free shipping.
tasks.description: Order a replacement debit card for your primary checking account, choosing the active card design with the lowest available replacement fee and using standard free shipping.

tasks.instruction: For your primary checking account, set up a daily email and text alert when the balance drops below $500, and also an immediate alert for any single withdrawal over $300.
tasks.name: For your primary checking account, set up a daily email and text alert when the balance drops below $500, and also an immediate alert for any single withdrawal over $300.

tasks.instruction: Create a $600 monthly budget for the Restaurants category, then in the last 30 days recategorize the first three uncategorized transactions under $100 to Restaurants.
tasks.name: Create a $600 monthly budget for the Restaurants category, then in the last 30 days recategorize the first three uncategorized transactions under $100 to Restaurants.

tasks.instruction: Start a personal loan application for debt consolidation, review the offers, and select the one with a term between 24 and 36 months, an APR under 10%, and the smallest loan amount that meets those criteria before submitting your income and full‑time employment details.

target_names: Personal loan offer: $4,000 for 24 months at 7.99% APR

tasks.instruction: Change your primary checking account to electronic‑only statements, then open each of the three most recent monthly statements for that account.
